preset.name: analysis_pack_v1
preset.description: Starter analysis-pack preset for cross-channel ad exploration (read-only). Includes core entities + daily performance by ad.

ad_group_ad.resource_name.description: Ad group ad stable identifier (resource name).

asset_group.resource_name.description: Asset group stable identifier (resource name). Useful for Performance Max (PMax).

asset_group.id.description: Asset group numeric id. Useful for Performance Max (PMax).

gaql_templates.base: SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, campaign.name, campaign.status, campaign.advertising_channel_type, campaign.advertising_channel_sub_type FROM campaign WHERE campaign.status != 'REMOVED'
SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, ad_group.name, ad_group.status, ad_group.type FROM ad_group WHERE ad_group.status != 'REMOVED'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, ad_group_ad.resource_name, ad_group_ad.status, ad_group_ad.ad.id, ad_group_ad.ad.type, ad_group_ad.ad.final_urls, ad_group_ad.ad.expanded_text_ad.headline_part1, ad_group_ad.ad.expanded_text_ad.headline_part2, ad_group_ad.ad.expanded_text_ad.headline_part3, ad_group_ad.ad.expanded_text_ad.description, ad_group_ad.ad.expanded_text_ad.description2, ad_group_ad.ad.responsive_search_ad.headlines, ad_group_ad.ad.responsive_search_ad.descriptions, ad_group_ad.ad.responsive_display_ad.headlines, ad_group_ad.ad.responsive_display_ad.descriptions, ad_group_ad.ad.responsive_display_ad.long_headline FROM ad_group_ad WHERE ad_group_ad.status != 'REMOVED'

SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, ad_group.id, ad_group.resource_name, ad_group_ad.resource_name, ad_group_ad.ad.id, segments.date, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value FROM ad_group_ad WHERE segments.date >= '{since}' AND segments.date <= '{until}'
SELECT customer.id, campaign.id, campaign.resource_name, asset_group.id, asset_group.resource_name, asset_group.name, asset_group.status FROM asset_group WHERE asset_group.status != 'REMOVED'
